Todos los derechos reservados. 2 n o i t a t n e Pres Welcome to fifth grade! The aim of this book is to help you in your process of learning English. We hope you are happy to learn. We’ll have tons of fun together! 3 Contents 1 Unit Home time Page 12 Hello! Page 8 2 Unit Kids can cook! 5 Unit Virtual reality Page 64 Page 24 6 Unit What do you want to be? Page 76 4 English 4th grade 3 Unit Let's go shopping Page 36 7 Unit A great day out! Page 92 4 Unit Ocean life Page 52 8 Unit A busy weekend Page 104 Contents 5 Student's materials Your Student’s book contains all the core work for the year divided into 8 units. Use the Activity book to practise and reinforce what you learned in the Student’s book. 5 Student’s Book English 5 grade Get ready with English • English • 5th grade Review Units 1-3 5 Activity Book th Brendan Dunne - Robin Newton You will have three unit reviews that will help you evaluate what you have learned! It's trivia time! 1 Ask a classmate. English 5th grade Do you brush your teeth at night? Yes, I always brush my teeth at night. Always Usually Sometimes Never Brendan Dunne - Robin Newton brush your teeth at night sleep eight hours at night go to the supermarket watch TV in the morning see your friends in the park 2 Look and role-play. Have you got any flour? 1. 2. 3. 4. No, I haven't. Have you got any chocolate? Yes, I have. Student’s Book • It's 4! 3 Read and say True or False. Hi, I’m Scott. On school days, I always get up at quarter past seven. I usually have cereal and orange juice for breakfast. I go to school at half past eight. At school, my favourite subjects are Science and Spanish. I don’t like Art. Painting and drawing are difficult for me! I go to football practice twice a week after school. I like doing exercise. It’s good for you. I usually have dinner at seven o’clock. I always do the dishes after dinner. Then, I sometimes read books and play computer games with my sister. Edición especial para el Ministerio de Educación. Prohibida su comercialización. Edición especial para el Ministerio de Educación. Prohibida su comercialización. 1. Scott always gets up at seven o’clock. 2. He never has cereal for breakfast. 3. His favourite subjects are Maths and PE. 4. He doesn’t like Art. 5. He goes to football practice twice a week. 6. He sometimes does the dishes. 48 Knowing your book Hello! 4 Listen and sing. 1 Read, listen, and say the name. The titles will help you follow and enjoy your book. Hello! Name: Anita Family: a brother Eyes: brown Birthday: March Pets: no pets Favourite subject: Science Name: Kim Family: only child Eyes: brown Birthday: October Pets: a dog Favourite subject: Art Name: Ben Family: two sisters Eyes: blue Birthday: June Pets: a cat Favourite subject: IT Name: Mark Family: a sister Eyes: brown Birthday: December Pets: a hamster Favourite subject: PE My name’s Kim! These are the things I like to do. playing basketball at the gym and singing songs with my friend Kim. 2 Play a game. These pages will introduce the characters of the book. They will be the guides in your book. 3 2 My birthday's in October and my favourite subject is Art. My name’s Ben! How are you? These are the things I like to do. Rollerblading in the park and playing games with my friend Mark. 5 Read and write about you. Are you Kim? Hi! My name’s Ellen. I’m ten years old. I like going to the cinema and playing basketball with my friends. At home, I like playing computer games and gardening. I don’t like drawing or painting. My favourite activity is reading! Yes. I am! Hello! My name’s Declan. I’m ten years old. I like going to the swimming pool and playing cards with my friends. At home, I like playing computer games and making models. I don’t like playing basketball or painting. My favourite activity is singing! 3 Ask a friend. Have you got any pets? When’s your birthday? What’s your favourite subject? What colour are your eyes? Have you got any brothers or sisters? Activity book Page 5 8 Hello! 9 Icons This icon shows that you need to do the activity in your personal notebook. This icon shows that you need to do the activity with your classmates. This icon shows that you will have fun and role-play some activities. X Activity book This icon shows that you will listen to an audio to complete an activity, or sing and chant! You will find extra practise in the Activity book. Page IMPORTANT: Do not write in this book. Do the activities in your personal notebook. 6 5 Unit 4 Ocean life Presentation At the beginning of each unit you will see pictures with new vocabulary reinforced with listening tasks. octopus crab turtle orca Presentation 1. Point and say the animal. 2. Listen and sing. 33 shark seal Unit goals jellyfish Unit goals blue whale • Listen and read dialogues about ocean life. • Enjoy a story. • Create a poster with your favourite sea animals. Reflect! • How do you think climate change is affecting the ocean ’s life? 31 Activity book 62 CL0000000001026 Page 33 I5_U4_2019_TXT_M_ 5582.indd 62 30-09-22 09:52 Unit 5 Think back! Think back! and Review At the end of each unit you will play a game with your classmates that will help you assess what you’ve learned. 17 Follow the steps and get the kingdom! Student's book Review 9 Page 22 Complete your card and play bingo with your class. STEP 1. Write a list of all the possessions and creatures of your kingdom. 10 • There are 70 trolls • There are 12 golden mirrors. STEP 2. Draw a 5 x 5 grid and locate your groups in random order. A 1 B B 5 8 I usually… I sometimes… I never… I get up at… I get to school at… I go to bed at… I tidy my room / do the dishes. I see my friends / walk the dog. I do my homework / practise a musical instrument. D 6 goblins 2 3 4 40 mirrors Think back! Complete your unit journal. STEP

the possessions and creatures of your kingdom. 10 • There are 70 trolls • There are 12 golden mirrors. STEP 2. Draw a 5 x 5 grid and locate your groups in random order. Language Passport Name: Family: Likes: Birthday: Pets: 2 Order the sentences and circle. a. ice-cream Do like you Do you like ice-cream ? pet Do have you a b. like Do you music like Yes, I do. / No, I don’t. ? Hello! 5 Student’s book What do I know? 4 Pages 10-11 Look at the pictures and complete the paragraph. Hello! I’m Thomas. During the holidays, I like going to the beach and in the sea with my dad. It’s a lot of fun. When I’m home, I like and listening to , I really like rock music! My sister Gabriela doesn’t like rock or swimming. She likes , but I don’t like it! 5 Write about your hobbies! Use: I like / I don’t like a. I swimming in the sea. b. singing. . c. I like d. I don’t like 6 . Student's book Pages 10-11 6 Look and write the time. 7 Tell a classmate about yourself. I have black hair and brown eyes. I’m wearing trousers and a jumper. I like rollerblading. I have brown hair and green eyes. I’m wearing jeans and a T-shirt. I like dancing! Hello! 7 Unit 1 1 Home time Pages 12-13 Look and write. see my friends have dinner do my homework tidy my room I do the dishes. 8 Student's book walk the dog do the dishes Student's book Page 14 2 Read and circle True or False. Hello! I'm Paz! This is my dog, Chubby. I always walk it after school. After dinner, I sometimes do the dishes with my mum, but I usually go to my bedroom and do my homework. My sister likes to watch TV after dinner, but I never watch TV. I usually like to listen to music. I always go to bed at ten o'clock. 3 a. Paz never walks her dog, Chubby. True / False b. Paz sometimes helps her mum with the dishes. True / False c. Paz always watches TV with her sister. True / False d. After dinner, Paz usually does her homework. True / False e. Paz sometimes goes to bed at ten o’clock. True / False Talk about your day with a classmate. I usually do my homework at 7 o'clock and sometimes have dinner at 8 o'clock. Oh, I usually have dinner at 7 o'clock. Unit 1 • Home time 9
False Talk about your day with a classmate. I usually do my homework at 7 o'clock and sometimes have dinner at 8 o'clock. Oh, I usually have dinner at 7 o'clock. Unit 1 • Home time 9
